expectations.text: Report flags the os.environ.get fallback default secret
expectations.evidence: Found at app/auth.py line 6 with forgery consequence

expectations.text: No Node/axios-specific noise against Python code

expectations.evidence: Credited pinned algorithm, claim validation, TTL, cookie flags, no-store header

notes: Baseline found two things the skill did not: python-jose 3.3.0 known CVEs (2024-33663/33664) and the passlib/bcrypt breakage. It missed the require_exp/missing-exp acceptance the skill confirmed by reading library source. Graded C+ vs the skill's F for the same fallback-secret defect; the skill's rubric treats a forgeable-signing-key path as an automatic Tier 1 failure.
